/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING /X:CASES 14010921, 14016006 & 14019436 ARE CONSOLIDATED/X:ALEX GUILMARTIN IS APPEARING ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT, UNDER THESUPERVISION OF STEPHEN ROSEN/WITEXCL:DEFENSE/INVOFF:OFFICER PATRICK GERRANS/WIT SWORN:OFFICER PAUL VOINSHTOK    /WIT SWORN:OFFICER SEAN DENNIS/X:OFFICER SEAN DENNIS, CALLED TO TESTIFY ON THIS CASE, HOWEVER HE IS NOT AWITNESS TO THE CONSOLIDATED CASES, DEFENDANT DID NOT AGREE TO BIFURCATE THEPRELIMINARY HEARING, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO DISMISS IS GRANTED, BOTH PARTIESSTIPULATE TO RE-FILING PURSUANT TO PC 1387,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OFALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING /DOP/
/ARRAIGNMENT ON CONSOLIDATED COMPLAINT & PRELIMIANRY HEARING/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO CONTINUE PRELIMINARY HEARING DUE TO WITNESS UNAVAILABILITY,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
